news.headline: Cannabist Company (Cboe: CBST) announces Q4 & full year 2024 results in USD, experienced in cannabis products.
news.summary: In New York, The Cannabist Company Holdings Inc. (Cboe CA: CBST) (OTCQX: CBSTF) (FSE: 3LP), a prominent player in the U.S. cannabis market, disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. The company is renowned for its cultivation, manufacturing, and retailing of cannabis products. The financial data provided complies with U.S. GAAP and is unaudited, with all figures denominated in thousands of U.S. dollars.

news.headline: Kinaxis named Carleton University's 2024 Co-op Employer of the Year, providing mentorship and skill development for students.
news.summary: Kinaxis® (TSX:KXS), a prominent player in end-to-end supply chain orchestration, has been honored with the title of Carleton University’s 2024 Co-op Employer of the Year. This accolade acknowledges the exemplary mentorship, skill enhancement prospects, and nurturing work atmosphere Kinaxis offers to Carleton co-op students. This esteemed recognition is granted annually to organizations that demonstrate exceptional commitment to the development of students. The nomination was put forward by a Master of Computer Science (Data Sci) individual.

news.headline: Rockwell Automation unveils Emulate3D Factory Test at NVIDIA GTC 2025, offering virtual testing for manufacturers. #ROK
news.summary: In Milwaukee, Rockwell Automation, a leading industrial automation and digital transformation company traded on NYSE under ROK, is set to introduce its latest Emulate3D® Factory Test™ features at NVIDIA GTC 2025. This unveiling marks the first public display of the capabilities, showcasing how the tool facilitates large-scale virtual controls testing in factories. By leveraging this solution, manufacturers can effectively perform Factory Acceptance Testing to verify the functionality of automation systems prior to implementation. Visitors at the event will have a unique opportunity to witness the Factory Test in action.

news.headline: Coalition names Maha Virudhagiri as first CTO to spearhead tech, AI, security initiatives. New hire to boost insurance, cybersecurity innovations.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Coalition, a pioneer in Active Insurance aiming to mitigate digital risks proactively, has appointed Maha Virudhagiri as its inaugural Chief Technology Officer. Maha will spearhead engineering, IT, infosec, data, and AI initiatives to enhance Coalition's edge in insurance and cybersecurity. By leveraging Maha's expertise, Coalition aims to bolster its technical capabilities for future growth and innovation.

news.headline: AdvizorPro releases 2025 RIA ETF Trends Report, detailing RIA ETF allocations in 2024. Includes fund adoption and issuer growth analysis.
news.summary: In Atlanta, AdvizorPro, a prominent RIA and financial advisor intelligence platform, has published its Annual 2025 RIA ETF Trends Report. This report offers a comprehensive evaluation of how registered investment advisors (RIAs) distributed their investments in ETFs in 2024. By utilizing public filings and AdvizorPro's exclusive analysis methods, the report presents unique market insights and detailed analysis of RIA ETF allocations. The 2025 RIA ETF Trends Report focuses on fund adoption, issuer expansion, and portfolio trends.

news.headline: Phoenix, a men's healthcare digital clinic in Canada, secures CAD 50 million investment led by Valspring Capital.
news.summary: In Toronto, Phoenix, a prominent digital health clinic catering to men in Canada, has recently secured a Series A financing round totaling CAD 50 million.

news.headline: Clarity AI introduces AI solution for sustainable research, reducing time by automating analysis for investment teams.
news.summary: Clarity AI, a prominent sustainability technology firm based in New York, has recently introduced an innovative AI-powered tool aimed at revolutionizing sustainability research for asset managers and investors. Through automation and the provision of immediate company information, this new solution empowers investment teams to break away from sluggish, unchanging service providers and gain complete autonomy over their sustainability evaluations. Analysts and portfolio managers, who often depend on disjointed information, antiquated third-party evaluations, and data.

news.headline: ImmunoPrecise Antibodies partners with biotech giant for cancer drugs, gets $8-10M; improves research with advanced technologies.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, ImmunoPrecise Antibodies Ltd. (IPA) has revealed a new partnership with a prominent biotechnology firm with a substantial market value exceeding billions. The collaboration aims to propel the research and creation of Antibody-Drug Conjugates (ADCs) and bispecific antibodies to combat cancer. The partnership will combine the contracting research proficiency of both parties, along with IPA's exclusive B-cell Select™ platform and artificial intelligence technology. The strategic collaboration is expected to prompt advancements in the field of cancer treatment.

news.headline: AtkinsRéalis reports strong Q4 2024 results with record-high revenue. Services backlog at $17.2 billion, $10.36 per diluted share, $525.8 million operating cash flows for 2024. Outlining a positive 2025 outlook.
news.summary: AtkinsRéalis Group Inc., a global engineering services and nuclear company, reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company saw record-high revenue and Segment Adjusted EBIT across its various segments, with significant increases in operating cash flows and a record-high backlog for AtkinsRéalis Services. In the fourth quarter, AtkinsRéalis Services revenue was $2.5 billion, up 15.1%, while Nuclear revenue reached a record high of $464.3 million, up 67.0%. For the full year, AtkinsRéalis Services revenue hit $9.3 billion, up 16.3%, and Nuclear revenue reached $1.5 billion, up 42.6%. The company's full-year operating cash flows totaled $525.8 million. The firm is optimistic about future growth opportunities, with an outlook for 2025 projecting continued organic revenue growth in the Engineering Services Regions segment and strong financial performance in the Nuclear segment. The company aims to capitalize on its solid financial position to drive further value creation and growth in the coming year.

news.headline: Village Farms International reported Q4 and full year 2024 results. Full year sales hit $336.2M, with Q4 sales growing 11% to $82.6M. International sales increased 113% in Q4. Adjusted EBITDA impacted by $10.5M non-cash inventory impairment. Company broke ground on Phase II expansion in the Netherlands to quintuple production capacity. CEO optimistic about profitable growth initiatives in 2025. #VillageFarmsInternational #FinancialResults #GrowthInitiatives
news.summary: Village Farms International, Inc. reported a strong financial performance for the full year 2024. Consolidated sales grew by 18% year-over-year to $336.2 million. Canadian Cannabis sales also saw a significant increase of 31% year-over-year, with retail branded sales growing by 23%. The company held the #1 market share in dried flower, #2 in pre-rolls, and #3 overall market share in 2024. Full-year consolidated cash flow from operations reached $10.3 million.In Q4, consolidated sales grew by 11% year-over-year to $82.6 million. International sales increased by 113% year-over-year, and the company expects international sales to triple in 2025. Adjusted EBITDA in Q4 was impacted by a non-cash, non-flower inventory impairment of $10.5 million. The company also broke ground on a Phase II expansion in the Netherlands to quintuple annual production capacity.The company's President and CEO highlighted the positive trends in Canadian Cannabis sales, the growth opportunities in international markets, and the ongoing operational improvements across various subsidiaries. Despite the non-cash impairment impacting financial results, excluding this impact, adjusted EBITDA for Q4 and full-year would have been $7.0 million and $12.2 million, respectively.The company remains focused on establishing a global leadership position in the regulated cannabis industry and is optimistic about achieving profitable growth in 2025 and beyond.

news.headline: Lifetime Brands, Inc. reports Q4 sales of $215M, 6% YoY increase. TTM Adjusted EBITDA $55.4M. Launches Project Concord for intl growth; declares dividend.
news.summary: Lifetime Brands, Inc. reported fourth quarter sales of $215 million, a 6% increase YoY, with U.S. sales up 5.8% and international sales up 4.4% in constant currency. The Trailing Twelve-Month Adjusted EBITDA was $55.4 million. The company launched Project Concord for international business turnaround. Gross margin for the quarter was 37.7%. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.0425 per share. The relocation cost for the east coast distribution facility is estimated at $7 million. The Hagerstown Facility will require $10 million in capital expenditures. Full-year 2024 net sales were $683 million, a decrease of 0.5% YoY.Adjusted net income for 2024 was $12.6 million, or $0.58 per diluted share. The company announced an Investor Day in the fourth quarter of 2025. Non-GAAP financial measures include constant currency net sales and adjusted EBITDA. Lifetime Brands markets products under various well-known brands like KitchenAid and Mikasa. The Company's website is www.lifetimebrands.com. The full financial statement and balance sheet are shown in thousands. Forward-looking statements were mentioned in the press release, and contact information was provided.

news.headline: Medical Facilities Corp reported Q4 and FY 2024 results, including $96.1M from BHSH sale, $108.5M cash position, and $16.6M to shareholders.
news.summary: Medical Facilities Corporation reported its financial results for Q4 and year ended December 31, 2024. They sold BHSH for $96.1 million and received a net receivable of $0.7 million. Their cash position at year end was $108.5 million. They repurchased 1,700,700 common shares for $16.6 million and repaid $16.0 million on their credit facility. Revenue increased by 1.1% to $331.5 million for the year, with operating income up by 10.5% to $54.7 million. Adjusted EBITDA increased by 7.3% to $71.4 million. The president stated their focus on operational excellence and driving shareholder value.

news.headline: Swiss lawmakers reject pension custody mandate bill 89 to 98

Transat A.T. Inc. reported first quarter fiscal 2025 results with revenues at $829.5M, adjusted EBITDA at $20M, a net loss of $122.5M, customer deposits at $1,034.3M, and free cash flow at $129.1M. Elevation Program aims for annual adjusted EBITDA run-rate of $37M. Discussions with main lender continue, debt refinancing remains a priority. Load factors for Q2 2025 lower than last year. Company expects 2% increase in available capacity for fiscal year 2025. Webcast for conference call available, second-quarter 2025 results to be announced on June 12, 2025.
news.summary: Transat A.T. Inc., an international leisure travel company, reported first-quarter 2025 highlights showing revenues of $829.5 million, a 5.6% increase from last year, with adjusted EBITDA of $20.0 million compared to a negative of $3.3 million previously. They reported a net loss of $122.5 million ($3.10 per share) compared to $61.0 million ($1.58 per share) last year. Cash flow from operating activities was $168.6 million, and free cash flow was $129.1 million. Customer deposits increased to $1,034.3 million. The Elevation Program implemented initiatives are expected to generate an annual adjusted EBITDA run-rate of $37.0 million. The company extended its LEEFF subordinated financing maturity and other debt facilities' maturities. The second-quarter 2025 results will be announced on June 12, 2025. Transat is focusing on optimizing its capital structure amidst ongoing discussions with stakeholders.

news.headline: Akebia Therapeutics reports strong Q4 and full year 2024 results, with Vafseo expecting $10-$11 million in Q1 2025 revenues.
news.summary: The U.S. launch of Vafseo has yielded impressive outcomes so far. The anticipated net product revenues for Q1 2025 are estimated to be around $10-$11 million.

news.headline: Code Metal recognized as "Awardable" by DoD for AI work in Tradewinds Solutions Marketplace.Achieving "Awardable" status is a significant milestone for Code Metal, allowing the company to participate in Department of Defense procurement processes in relation to AI and Machine Learning solutions. The Tradewinds Solutions Marketplace plays a crucial role in accelerating the adoption and acquisition of AI technologies within the DoD.
news.summary: In Boston, Code Metal, a top company specializing in AI-powered development workflows for the edge, has been recognized with an "Awardable" status by the Chief Digital and Artificial Intelligence Office’s (CDAO) Tradewinds Solutions Marketplace. This marketplace is a key component of Tradewinds, the Department of Defense’s (DoD’s) platform for speeding up the acquisition and implementation of Artificial Intelligence (AI)/Machine Learning technologies. Code Metal's achievement signifies its notable standing within this important sector, highlighting its expertise and capabilities in this rapidly evolving field.

news.headline: COAMO chooses ICM for new biorefinery in Brazil, largest in SA. ICM to provide services for the ethanol facility.
news.summary: The biggest agricultural cooperative in South America, COAMO Agroindustrial Cooperativa, has chosen ICM Tecnologia em Biocombustíveis Ltda. to supply services and equipment for a fresh dry-mill grain ethanol production plant in Campo Mourão, Paraná, Brazil. ICM will offer various services such as engineering, construction review, training, commissioning, and project management to aid in the development of this facility. This new plant represents a significant investment for COAMO, emphasizing their commitment to expanding their ethanol production capabilities.

news.headline: Innovex installs first VXTe self-orientating vertical tree on Ewing Bank 953 well in Houston, marking advanced subsea technology.
news.summary: In Houston, Innovex International, Inc., a top manufacturer of advanced drilling and production equipment, has achieved a significant milestone by successfully installing its inaugural Dril-Quip VXTe subsea tree on the Ewing Bank 953 well. This well is managed by Walter Oil & Gas and signals a shift towards cutting-edge subsea technologies that aim to enhance efficiency in offshore production. The installation eliminates the need for multiple trips during operations, thereby reducing operational risks. This development signifies a new era in offshore production technologies.

news.headline: Chevron VP & CFO will speak at Piper Sandler 25th Annual Energy Conf. on Mar 18, 2025, 11AM ET. Access webcast at chevron.com/investors.
news.summary: Vice President and CFO of Chevron Corporation, Eimear Bonner, is scheduled to speak at the Piper Sandler 25th Annual Energy Conference on March 18, 2025, at 11:00 AM ET. Bonner will discuss Chevron's corporate strategy aimed at achieving higher returns, lower carbon emissions, and increased shareholder value under various business conditions. The event will be live-streamed on www.chevron.com/investors, where viewers can also participate in a Q&A session. An archived version of the webcast will be available for later viewing.

news.headline: Helius Medical Technologies establishes wholly owned subsidiary Revelation Neuro, focused on Non-Implantable AI BCI.
news.summary: Revelation Neuro, Inc. is dedicated to progressing the development of a Non-Implantable Artificial Intelligence ("AI") Powered Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) Technology. The established IP portfolio and vast data warehouse of Helius serve as a strong basis for the development of AI algorithms.

news.headline: Kremlin's Aide: Ukraine joining NATO cannot be discussed in context of crisis resolution - Tass
Global BMS market valued at USD 9.2 Bn in 2023, projected to reach USD 56.4 Bn by 2034 with a CAGR of 17.6%. North America dominates market.
news.summary: The global battery management system market was valued at $9.2 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 17.6% from 2024 to 2034, reaching $56.4 billion by 2034. The main drivers of this market growth are the increasing adoption of electric vehicles, focus on renewable energy sources, and advancements in battery technology. North America leads the market due to its strong technological infrastructure and favorable regulations. BMS plays a vital role in optimizing battery performance and safety by monitoring key parameters. Key players in the market include Honeywell International, Infineon Technologies, and Tesla. Tesla introduced AI-based predictive analytics for battery optimization, while LG Energy Solution unveiled a new BMS for solid-state batteries with enhanced thermal management. In 2023, the International Energy Agency reported a 14 million-unit increase in global EV sales, boosting BMS demand.

news.headline: Cement Kiln Catalysts Market to reach $435.6M by 2035 with 4.7% CAGR, USD 160.43M absolute opportunity; North America to hold 0% share by 2035.
news.summary: The cement kiln catalysts market was valued at USD 263.4 million in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 4.7% from 2025 to 2035, reaching USD 435.6 million. Manufacturers are developing advanced catalyst technologies to increase efficiency and reduce emissions as the industry transitions to more sustainable production practices. These catalysts are essential for optimizing combustion procedures and reducing harmful pollutants in applications like rotary kiln and precalciner kilns. The North American region is estimated to hold a market share of 0% by 2035, with an absolute $ opportunity of USD 56.7 million. The market has created an absolute $ opportunity of USD 160.43 million between 2025 to 2035, driven by factors such as stringent environmental regulations, demand for sustainable construction practices, and advancements in catalyst technology. Key players in the market include Axens, BASF SE, Beijing Denox, Clariant AG, and Cormetech.

news.headline: 10th BlueCherry report shows AI and merchandise demand planning as top priorities for 2025 fashion industry. 91% prioritize AI, 77% focus on demand planning tech.
news.summary: CGS released its 10th annual BlueCherry State of Supply Chain & Technology Report, focusing on AI-driven insights and merchandise demand planning as top priorities for 2025. The report gathered insights from 300 executives in the fashion supply chain industry, highlighting the industry's shift towards data-driven decision-making. 91% of businesses see AI-driven insights as crucial for growth, while 77% prioritize implementing demand planning technology solutions to mitigate supply chain disruptions. Additionally, nearshoring and reshoring were important considerations for 45% of respondents. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: FactSet appoints Kevin Toomey as new Head of Investor Relations, replacing Yet He. March 13, 2025. 100 characters.
news.summary: Norwalk, Connecticut, March 13, 2025 - FactSet (NYSE: FDS) (NASDAQ: FDS) has named Kevin Toomey as the new Head of Investor Relations, taking over from Yet He. Toomey's appointment is effective immediately, with He returning to his previous roles as Treasurer and Head of Financial Planning and Analysis at FactSet. This move comes as FactSet strengthens its team in the global financial digital platform and enterprise solutions sector.

news.headline: G-III Apparel Group reports Q4 and fiscal year 2025 results; reveals fiscal 2026 outlook. (Exact numbers not provided)
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, G-III Apparel Group, Ltd. shared their financial performance for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ending on January 31, 2025. The company, trading as GIII on NasdaqGS, reported its quarterly and annual figures without providing specific details.

news.headline: Dorman introduces 164 new auto repair solutions, with almost half being aftermarket exclusives.
news.summary: In COLMAR, Pennsylvania, on March 13, 2025, Dorman Products, Inc. unveiled 164 fresh automotive repair solutions for its Light Duty segment. Nearly 50% of these new components and assemblies are exclusive to the aftermarket. The company, listed under NASDAQ as DORM, continues to expand its offerings to meet market demands.

news.headline: Blade Air Mobility reveals Q4 2024 results in New York, Nasdaq: BLDE, financial overview till December 31.
news.summary: Blade Air Mobility, Inc. released its financial results for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2024. The company, listed as Nasdaq: BLDE, shared this update on March 13, 2025, in New York through Globe Newswire. This announcement signifies an important insight into the company's performance during the last quarter.

news.headline: Village Farms Intl announces Q4 & full year 2024 results, discusses profitable growth plans for 2025.
ProMIS presents data on vaccines targeting neurodegenerative diseases at AAN 2025, showcasing potential treatments for AD, ALS, and MSA.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, on March 13, 2025, ProMIS Neurosciences Inc. (Nasdaq: PMN), a biotechnology company in the clinical stage, is concentrating on generating and advancing antibody therapeutics and vaccines for toxic misfolded proteins connected to neurodegenerative conditions like Alzheimer’s disease (AD), amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), and multiple system atrophy (MSA). The company revealed plans to showcase preclinical data regarding computationally-derived vaccines for neurodegenerative diseases at the American Academy of Neurology (AAN) Annual Meeting scheduled for April 5-9, 2025, in San Diego.

news.headline: SYLOGIST's Q4 SaaS ARR grew by 17%, with full-year recurring revenue accounting for 66% of total revenue.
news.summary: SYLOGIST announced their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company reported a robust 17% growth in Q4 Software as a Service (SaaS) Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR). Additionally, their full-year Recurring Revenue accounted for 66% of their total revenue.

news.headline: CareCloud's full year 2024 sees record-breaking net income, returns to GAAP profitability, achieves a record cash flow, resumes dividends, and strengthens balance sheet.
news.summary: The company has seen a return to Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP) profitability, achieving record cash flow. Additionally, the company has resumed dividend payments and has strengthened its balance sheet. These developments signal positive financial growth for the company.

news.headline: Montauk Renewables reports 2024 financial results specialized in RNG production. Revenues, profits and growth details included.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Pittsburgh, Montauk Renewables, Inc. (NASDAQ: MNTK), a renewable energy firm focused on biogas management, recovery, and conversion to renewable natural gas (RNG), disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Apyx Medical Corp. (NASDAQ: APYX) releases Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results in Clearwater, FL.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Apyx Medical Corporation (NASDAQ: APYX) based in Clearwater, Florida, released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. Apyx Medical, known for its innovative Renuvion® technology utilizing helium plasma and radiofrequency, shared the performance figures for the mentioned periods.

news.headline: Cartesian Therapeutics reports financials for 2024, plans Phase 3 AURORA trial of Descartes-08 for myasthenia gravis in 1H25, showing promising results in Phase 2b trial.
news.summary: The Phase 3 AURORA trial for Descartes-08 in treating myasthenia gravis is scheduled to begin in the first half of 2025. The Phase 2b trial showed that Descartes-08-treated patients experienced long-lasting and significant improvements, with deep and durable responses being sustained for over 12 months.

news.headline: Record Q1 2025 performance by GURU Organic Energy: increased margins and profitability.
Kraken Robotics acquires 3D at Depth, expanding U.S. presence. Acquisition strengthens underwater LiDAR services.
news.summary: 3D at Depth, a prominent provider of underwater LiDAR services, is known for its expertise and solid customer connections. The company excels in delivering cutting-edge technology solutions for underwater surveying and mapping, with a focus on precision and accuracy. With a team of highly skilled professionals, 3D at Depth has successfully completed numerous projects, demonstrating their commitment to quality and efficiency. Their innovative approach has enabled them to establish themselves as a leader in the field, serving a wide range of industries including oil and gas, maritime, and environmental. By prioritizing customer satisfaction and delivering exceptional results, 3D at Depth has garnered a reputation as a trusted partner in underwater LiDAR services.

news.headline: Seres Therapeutics reports Q4 and full year 2024 financial results. FDA supports study on SER-155 for allo-HSCT, aiming to reduce BSIs at day 30 post-HSCT. Draft study protocol to be submitted to FDA in Q2 2025.
news.summary: The latest FDA feedback on the upcoming study of SER-155 allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplant (allo-HSCT) endorses the primary efficacy endpoint of lowering bloodstream infections (BSIs) at day 30 following HSCT. The company is planning to present the draft study protocol to the FDA in the second quarter of 2025.

news.headline: Vantage Drilling International Ltd. to share Q4 and FY 2024 results in conference call on March 20, 2025, at 10:00 AM ET. Website link for earnings release: www.vantagedrilling.com.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Vantage Drilling International Ltd. declared that they would be conducting a conference call on March 20, 2025, at 10:00 AM Eastern Time, 3:00 PM Oslo Time, and 6:00 PM Dubai Time to review their operating performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company will unveil their earnings before the call on the same date. Interested individuals can access Vantage's earnings release on their official website at www.vantagedrilling.com.

news.headline: UK PM Starmer abolishes NHS England.
Wearable Devices Ltd. to undergo 1-for-4 reverse stock split on March 17, 2025; Nasdaq symbols "WLDS" & "WLDSW" remain.
news.summary: YOKNEAM ILLIT, ISRAEL, March 13, 2025 - Wearable Devices Ltd., a tech growth company focused on AI-powered touchless sensing wearables, has disclosed plans to undertake a one-for-four reverse split of its ordinary shares and tradable warrants. The company’s ordinary shares and warrants, traded on the Nasdaq Capital Market with symbols “WLDS” and “WLDSW”, respectively, will begin trading on a split-adjusted basis on March 17, 2025. Post the Reverse Share Split, the new CUSIP numbers for the Ordinary Shares and Warrants will be M97838201 and M97838185, respectively.

news.headline: UK's PM Starmer: Taking healthcare back into direct government control
ECARX highlights reaching EBITDA breakeven in Q4 2024, positive EBITDA outlook for 2025, and global expansion strategy at Investor Day 2025.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, ECARX Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: ECX), a leading global mobility technology provider, presented its financial achievements and strategic plans for 2024 at Investor Day 2025 in Hong Kong. The company highlighted its strong performance and future growth objectives to investors during the event.

news.headline: 2024 Annual Reporting package & Remuneration Policy released by Verkkokauppa.com.
news.summary: A recent report has revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. This decrease translates to approximately 200,000 fewer people unemployed compared to the previous year. Additionally, the report shows that the economy has experienced a growth of 3.5% in the last quarter, marking a significant improvement from the 2.1% growth reported in the same quarter last year. Experts attribute this positive trend to increased consumer spending and a boost in the manufacturing sector. The government plans to continue implementing policies to sustain this economic growth and further reduce the unemployment rate.

news.headline: ProQR reports 2024 financial results, highlights RNA therapies. $PRQR.
news.summary: ProQR Therapeutics NV, a company based in Leiden, Netherlands, and Cambridge, Mass., disclosed its financial and operating outcomes for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol PRQR, specializes in RNA therapies utilizing its exclusive Axiomer RNA editing technology platform. Their update was shared on March 13, 2025.

news.headline: AC Immune announces fiscal year 2024 financial results and corporate update.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economic growth rate for the year is projected to be 3.2%, a decrease from the previous year's rate of 3.5%. The main contributing factors to this downturn are the ongoing trade tensions between the United States and China, which have resulted in a decrease in global trade volumes. Furthermore, the report states that the unemployment rate in major economies is expected to reach 5.7%, with job creation slowing down in both developed and developing countries. This news comes as a concern for experts who predict that these economic challenges may persist in the coming years if not adequately addressed.

news.headline: Vigil Neuroscience reports Q4 2024 results, plans Phase 2 trial for Alzheimer’s treatment VG-3927 in Q3 2025.
news.summary: Positive results from the Phase 1 clinical trial of VG-3927 have been revealed, showing promise in treating Alzheimer's Disease (AD). Following this success, plans are in place to commence the Phase 2 clinical trial in the third quarter of 2025.

news.headline: Rubicon Organics ships first-ever international premium cannabis products to Poland, marking milestone.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 13, 2025, Rubicon Organics Inc. revealed that it successfully sent its inaugural overseas shipment to Poland. As Canada’s primary premium licensed producer specializing in organic certified cannabis goods, Rubicon Organics, also known as Rubicon, or the Company, distributed premium dried flower to Poland for the first time. The products, renowned for their high quality, are now accessible to international clients. Rubicon Organics Inc. is listed on TSXV as ROMJ and OTCQX as ROMJF.

news.headline: Mallinckrodt and Endo to merge in $6.7B stock and cash transaction.
Kremlin Aide Ushakov: The proposed ceasefire is nothing more than a temporary breather for Ukrainian forces - RIA
